name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn operates under FirstCash Holdings, the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ stores across the U.S., Latin America, and the UK.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is a brand operating under FirstCash Holdings, Inc., headquartered at 1600 West 7th Street in Fort Worth, Texas. FirstCash acquired Cash America International in 2016 and is today the leading international operator of pawn stores, publicly traded and included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index. The company employs approximately 22,000 people across the U.S., Latin America, and the United Kingdom.

The core offering is small, non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property — meaning borrowers hand over an item as collateral and owe nothing beyond forfeiting the item if they choose not to repay. Stores buy and sell a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and general merchandise. The company also purchases gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash payouts and offers a layaway plan requiring just 10% down. Through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash additionally provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through a network of over 15,000 active merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash/Cash America from independent pawn shops is sheer scale and institutional stability. With more than 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, the UK, and all of Mexico plus Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador, customers are more likely to find a nearby location than with regional competitors. The company's S&P index membership signals financial durability. The AFF subsidiary also extends its reach beyond traditional pawn into point-of-sale financing, giving it a broader footprint in consumer lending than most pawn operators.

For consumers, the honest assessment is that pawn loans are expensive short-term financing and pawned items are typically valued well below market. The website does not disclose interest rates or fee structures, which is a significant transparency gap. Pawn is best treated as a last resort for fast cash or a way to sell unwanted items for immediate liquidity — not a primary credit solution. The non-recourse nature is a genuine consumer protection: defaulting on a pawn loan does not result in debt collection or credit damage.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans — defaulting only forfeits the collateral, no debt collection or credit damage
Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for broad accessibility
Buys gold, silver, and platinum for same-day cash payouts
Layaway plan available with just 10% down for purchases
No credit check required for pawn loans
Publicly traded S&P MidCap 400 company — financially stable and regulated
Lease-to-own options available through AFF subsidiary at 15,000+ retail merchant partners
cons: Interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website — a major transparency gap
Pawned items are typically valued far below retail or resale market value
Lease-to-own products through AFF can carry high total costs relative to retail price
Loan terms are short by nature; missing the redemption window means permanent loss of the item
Not available in all 50 states — coverage gaps exist
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash without a credit check and own items of value to pledge
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted electronics, jewelry, tools, or musical instruments
People selling unwanted gold, silver, or jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers who want to buy on layaway with minimal upfront commitment
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn (operating under FirstCash) is best for consumers who need immediate cash without a credit check, own pawnable assets, or want affordable secondhand merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are not disclosed upfront and item valuations are typically well below market — making this a convenience-of-last-resort borrowing option, not a cost-competitive one.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Retail merchandise sales (electronics, tools, jewelry, appliances, sporting goods)
Tools and appliances buying and selling
Point-of-sale retail finance for consumer goods and services
Store locator for 2,500+ North and Latin America locations
